title: Phase Out Dashboard UI — Migrate to Game UI

output.summary: Strategic classification — phasing out dashboard and migrating all functionality to game UI crosses two major domains, has multiple valid approaches, and has lasting architectural consequences.
output.rationale: Crosses dashboard + game domains, multiple valid migration strategies, lasting consequences expensive to reverse, directive states problem without prescribing solution approach.

output.summary: Read directive.md — CEO wants to phase out dashboard UI entirely and consolidate all functionality into the game UI as the single interface.

Read vision.md, lessons (agent-behavior, orchestration), reviewed all dashboard components (DashboardPage, StatsBar, DirectiveProgress, AttentionRequired, CeoBrief, WorkSummary, TeamCard, SchedulerCard, OrientationBanner), game components (GamePage, GameHeader, CanvasOffice, panels: TeamPanel, OpsPanel, AgentPanel, LogPanel, ActionPanel, DirectivePanel, BookshelfPanel, FurniturePanels), router.tsx, and Sidebar.tsx. Game already has HUD tabs (Team, Tasks, Ops, Log) covering most dashboard functionality. Key gaps: CeoBrief, SchedulerCard, OrientationBanner, and the separate pages (Sessions, Projects/Directives, Org) accessed via sidebar navigation.
